rule_change: H1B tech-only/zero-non-tech filings = warning (not hard PASS) for ALL firm sizes; hard PASS only for explicit no-sponsorship language, confirmed no-sponsor list, or tiny zero-total-history orgs.

rescued_then_verified.live_recheck: DEAD — careers.nike.com/.../R-79157 returns 404; Nike HR job category shows 0 open roles. Agent's 'active via aggregator mirror' was an over-claim. NOT applyable.

conclusion: Looser H1B rule working as intended (kept big-brand + cap-exempt roles in play). Best genuinely-live targets are cap-exempt PNW university roles (UW 78, OSU 76) + PwC talent pool (78). Nike GO did not survive live re-verification (dead posting). Cambia remains the one submitted application.
